article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: One clear attribution violation (flagging quoted language as author bias), some missed obvious author-prose bias (e.g., 'embattled Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz', 'whopping 8,000% surge'), and one debatable label choice. Not catastrophic, but moderate issues.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged 'mob of agitators' despite it being within an attributed quote to DHS Secretary Kristi Noem.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One of four items was not in the author’s voice (quoted) and thus a false positive; others are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as 'embattled Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz' and 'whopping 8,000% surge', and potentially loaded headline phrasing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: ‘Sky-rocketing’ correctly labeled as Word Choice; 'serial illegal immigrant...' labeled as Sensationalism is arguable; 'poured gasoline...' would better fit Sensationalism/Spin than Opinion-as-Fact.
